channel.title: Speech-Translation on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Speech-Translation on Arrans github.io

item.title: NVIDIA-NeMo/NeMo
item.description: A scalable generative AI framework built for researchers and developers working on Large Language Models, Multimodal, and Speech AI (Automatic Speech Recognition and Text-to-Speech)

item.title: huggingface/speech-to-speech
item.description: Build local voice agents with open-source models
